# Enceladus.ai

> Enceladus.ai is an AI consulting business helping organisations navigate and implement AI effectively. Founded by Ian Lawton (CTO) and Dr Paul Gibson (PhD in AI), we combine 18+ years of digital transformation expertise with deep academic AI knowledge.

We are an offshoot of Agency51 and PureNet, established UK ecommerce and digital agencies based in York. Our focus is on practical AI implementation rather than theoretical frameworks.

## Services

- **AI Strategy & Consulting**: We assess operations, identify genuine AI opportunities, and build roadmaps that deliver measurable outcomes
- **Tool Implementation**: From GitHub Copilot to custom GPTs, we implement AI development tools with configuration, training, and workflow integration
- **Agent Development**: Purpose-built AI agents that automate complex workflows, integrated with existing systems
- **Training & Enablement**: Practical, hands-on training that transforms how teams approach problems and produce work

## Approach

Our engagement process follows four steps:

1. **Discover**: Map operations, understand pain points, identify where AI adds genuine value
2. **Design**: Build solutions that fit your reality—technology, people, and processes
3. **Deliver**: Implement, test, and refine alongside your team with knowledge transfer
4. **Evolve**: Ongoing support to stay current, optimise, and identify new opportunities

## Team

- **Ian Lawton** - CTO & Co-founder. Technical leader with 18+ years in digital transformation. Deep systems architecture expertise with practical understanding of how AI reshapes teams and workflows.
- **Dr Paul Gibson** - Director & Co-founder. PhD in Artificial Intelligence. Bridges the gap between cutting-edge research and practical business outcomes.

## Contact

- Email: hello@enceladus.ai

- Location: York, UK

## Related

- [Agency51](https://www.agency51.com): UK-based ecommerce development agency specialising in BigCommerce, B2B commerce, and headless implementations
- [PureNet](https://www.purenet.co.uk): Ecommerce and portal solutions agency delivering enterprise solutions since 2006
